PALO-AI n8n architecture-preview media#

This folder contains the three-minute narrated developer-preview demo and its supporting script and captions.

  • palo-ai-n8n-architecture-preview-3min.mp4 — 1920×1080, H.264/AAC, exactly 3:00.
  • palo-ai-n8n-demo-script.md — scene plan, narration and status language.
  • palo-ai-n8n-demo-captions.srt — English accessibility captions.
  • palo-ai-n8n-demo-narration.txt — narration source.
  • palo-ai-n8n-demo-slides.txt — timed visual sequence.

The demo is an architecture preview. It does not claim n8n verification, an official partnership, production readiness or unavoidable interception of every tool call.

PrerequisiteNo specialist prerequisite stated
Recommended next stepReturn to the Documentation Library

Privacy-first feedback

Help improve this guide

Your feedback stays in your browser until you explicitly copy it, download it, or open an email draft. Do not include secrets, personal data, credentials or production identifiers.

PALO public documentation. Developer preview boundaries apply.
